name: @sitecore-jss/sitecore-jss-angular-schematics
description: Scaffolding schematics for Sitecore JSS Angular apps

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test-package
scripts.generate-docs: npx typedoc --plugin typedoc-plugin-markdown --outputFileStrategy Members --parametersFormat table --readme none --out ../../ref-docs/sitecore-jss-angular-schematics src/jss-component/index.ts --githubPages false
